example_prompt: Create a recurring billing plan (monthly rent, SaaS subscription, tontine) that customers can subscribe to.

amount.description: The recurring charge amount per installment.

name.description: Commercial name of the plan shown to subscribers. Example: "Loyer mensuel", "Plan Standard".

nbrInstallments.description: Total number of installments. Omit for an open-ended (indefinite) plan.

installmentIntervalDays.description: Days between each recurring charge. Default: 30.

customerMessage.description: Payment instruction or reminder message sent to the subscriber with each charge notification.

id.description: Unique plan identifier. Pass to create_subscription as subscriptionPlanId.

gotchas: This endpoint uses the billing microservice. The base URL is https://api.bictorys.com/billing/v1 — not https://api.bictorys.com/pay/v1. Using the wrong base URL returns 404.
A subscription plan is a template. Creating a plan does not charge anyone. To start billing a customer, call create_subscription with the plan's id as subscriptionPlanId.
installmentIntervalDays defaults to 30 (monthly). For weekly plans use 7, for quarterly use 90. Bictorys triggers charges automatically on each due date.
Sandbox base URL is https://api.test.bictorys.com — the production URL is https://api.bictorys.com.
